title: SENIOR GUARDIANSHIP ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: IMPACT NW SENIOR GAP SENIOR GUARDIANSHIP ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides court-appointed guardianship and conservatorship, trustee, care management, pre-planning (with Power of Attorney and Healthcare Representative) and executor of estate services for older adults. Services are by appointment only. Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 294-7445 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 294-7445 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah and Washington Counties Services: Durable Power of Attorney for Asset Management Guardianship Assistance Personal Finances Administration Private Guardianship/Conservatorship Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
